name: 9q12_qh_heterochromatin
description: 9q12 heterochromatin (qh) block containing HSat3 (CATTC repeat) variable from 0 to >20 Mb between haplotypes. The 9qh+ polymorphism is the most common heteromorphism in human cytogenetics (~8% population). Site of pericentric inversion polymorphism (inv(9)(p12q13)).

architecture.internal_structure: Pure HSat3 CATTC-pentamer tandem array; varies 0-25 Mb between haplotypes; CHM13 anchors the canonical block size; GRCh38 has placeholder N-gap.
